meta_description: Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg – your idyllic retreat on Lake Rheinsberg with marina, wellness, gastronomy and stylish accommodation.
hero_subtitle: An idyllic retreat right on Lake Rheinsberg
hero_slide2_desc: Stylish accommodation with lake and marina views
hero_slide3_desc: 2,000 m² spa area for body and mind
quote_text: Relaxation, nature and maritime flair in the Mecklenburg Lake District
discover_desc: Welcome to Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg – your retreat by the water, where relaxation, nature and stylish comfort come together. Located in the Mecklenburg Lake District, it is the perfect place for a peaceful escape.
accommodation_desc: Enjoy maritime-style rooms and elegant suites with views of the harbor, lighthouse and surrounding nature. A perfect combination of comfort and scenic beauty.
wellness_desc: Relax in a 2,000 m² wellness area featuring pool, sauna, spa treatments and peaceful relaxation zones.
about_meta_description: Discover Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg – an idyllic lakeside resort with marina, wellness, gastronomy and stylish accommodation.
about_hero_desc: An idyllic retreat right on Lake Rheinsberg
about_nature_desc: Welcome to Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg – your retreat by the water, where relaxation, nature, and stylish comfort come together. Located in the picturesque Mecklenburg Lake District, the resort offers a unique combination of tranquility and maritime atmosphere.
about_guest_desc: Whether you are looking for a relaxing holiday, an active weekend or a special break, you will find it here. Enjoy spacious rooms and suites, culinary highlights, wellness experiences and explore the surrounding lake landscape, historic Rheinsberg and its famous castle.
about_location_desc: Located in the Mecklenburg Lake District, the resort is surrounded by nature, water and scenic landscapes ideal for relaxation and outdoor activities.
about_why2: Perfect for boating and water sports
about_val1_desc: Maritime-style rooms and elegant suites with views of the harbor, lighthouse and surrounding countryside.
about_val2_desc: 2,000 m² wellness area with pool, sauna, treatments and relaxation spaces.
about_val3_desc: Regional and international cuisine in restaurants and bars with a beautiful lake view.
about_val4_desc: Discover the marina, rent boats or enjoy life directly on the water.
contact_meta_description: Contact Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg for bookings, marina stays, wellness experiences and events by Lake Rheinsberg.
contact_desc: Plan your stay at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg
contact_train_desc: Travel via Berlin to Rheinsberg station. From there, the resort is just a short taxi ride away.
contact_car_desc: Easily accessible from Berlin (approx. 1.5 hours). Follow directions towards Rheinsberg in Brandenburg.
contact_air_desc: Nearest airport: Berlin Brandenburg Airport (BER), approx. 100 km from the resort.
gastro_meta_description: Enjoy culinary experiences at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg with restaurants, bar and marina dining.
gastro_desc: A Culinary Journey at Lake Rheinsberg
gastro_overview_desc: The Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg offers a wide range of culinary experiences. Restaurants and bars are the central meeting place for breakfast, dinner or a relaxing drink by the water. Guests enjoy creative regional and international specialties in a stylish maritime atmosphere.
gastro_rest1_desc: The half-board restaurant offers fresh regional cuisine right on the marina. Enjoy fish, meat and vegetarian dishes with a beautiful view of Lake Rheinsberg.
gastro_rest2_desc: A relaxed dining experience with regional and international dishes in a modern maritime atmosphere directly at the harbor.
gastro_rest3_desc: Enjoy cocktails, wines and refreshing drinks with a stunning waterfront view. The perfect place to relax after a day at the lake.
gastro_rest4_desc: Experience vibrant nightlife with music, cocktails and a stylish atmosphere directly by the waterfront.
gastro_cta_desc: Enjoy unforgettable dining experiences at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg.
ta_page_title: Explore Rheinsberg | Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg
ta_meta_description: Discover the natural and cultural highlights around Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg including lakes, cycling routes and historic sites.
ta_desc: Discover nature, lakes and cultural highlights
ta_overview_desc: The Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg is located in the beautiful Mecklenburg Lake District. Surrounded by lakes, forests and historic towns, the region offers endless opportunities for relaxation, exploration and outdoor activities.
ta_attr1_desc: A beautiful lake region connecting Berlin with the Mecklenburg Lake District, perfect for boating, canoeing and exploring nature.
ta_attr2_desc: Over 350 km of marked trails for running, hiking and Nordic walking in a stunning natural environment.
ta_attr3_desc: Discover the land of a thousand lakes by bike with scenic routes through forests, villages and along waterways.
ta_attr4_desc: A wide network of hiking trails offers year-round experiences in nature with lakes, forests and wildlife.
ta_attr5_desc: A historic cultural highlight where Frederick the Great once lived, surrounded by beautiful gardens and lakes.
ta_cta_desc: Discover the beauty of the Mecklenburg Lake District while staying at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg.
gallery_meta_description: Discover Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg through our photo gallery.
gallery_desc: Discover the beauty of Hafendorf Rheinsberg
gallery_cta_desc: Plan your stay at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg and enjoy unforgettable moments.
room_meta_description: Discover rooms at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg with lake views and comfortable design.
room_desc: Comfort and relaxation at Lake Rheinsberg
room_overview_title: Discover the Comfort of Our Rooms
room_overview_desc: The Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg offers individually designed rooms with balconies and beautiful views of nature or the lake. Guests enjoy comfort, maritime style and a relaxing atmosphere.
room_room1_desc: 28 m² room with balcony and peaceful surroundings.
room_room2_desc: 28 m² room with balcony and side lake view.
room_room3_desc: Room with direct lake view and modern design.
room_dog_desc1: The Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg warmly welcomes guests with dogs. Enjoy a special holiday experience with your four-legged companion in the beautiful natural surroundings.
room_dog_desc2: Dogs are welcome in all room categories. Please inform us during booking. Fee: €15 per pet per night.
room_cta_desc: Enjoy a relaxing stay at Hafendorf Rheinsberg
suites_meta_description: Discover luxury suites at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg with marina views and premium comfort.
suites_hero_text: Luxury and comfort at Lake Rheinsberg
suites_overview_text: From elegant junior suites to exclusive penthouse suites, each accommodation offers comfort, space and stunning views of the marina and Lake Rheinsberg.
suites_room1_desc: 42 m² suite with balcony, living area and sofa bed.
suites_room2_desc: Spacious suite with terrace and private dock.
suites_room3_desc: Perfect for families with two bedrooms and terrace.
suites_room4_desc: 102 m² luxury suite with fireplace and harbor view.
suites_room5_desc: Exclusive suite with private sauna and lake views.
suites_dog_desc1: The Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg warmly welcomes guests with dogs.  Enjoy a special holiday experience with your four-legged companion in the beautiful natural surroundings.
suites_dog_desc2: Dogs are welcome in all room categories. Please inform us during booking. Fee: €15 per pet per night.
suites_cta_text: Enjoy luxury and relaxation at Hafendorf Rheinsberg
pool_meta_title: Pool Area | Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg
pool_meta_description: Enjoy the pool area at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg with panoramic harbor views.
pool_hero_text: Swimming with a panoramic harbor view
pool_overview_text: The pool at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg offers a relaxing experience with a unique panoramic view of the harbor, lighthouse and surrounding nature.
pool_main_text: 25 x 6 m pool with panoramic views of the harbor village.
pool_view_text: Swim while enjoying views of the marina and lighthouse.
pool_relax_text: Quiet zones designed for rest and recovery.
pool_wellness_text: Direct access to sauna and wellness facilities.
pool_cta_text: Enjoy swimming and relaxation at Hafendorf Rheinsberg
spa_meta_title: Wellness & Spa | Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg
spa_meta_description: Relax in the spa and wellness area at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg.
spa_overview_text: The Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg offers an exclusive wellness area covering 2,000 m². Guests can relax body and mind in a peaceful and tranquil atmosphere.
spa_treatments_text: Massages, wellness treatments and relaxation therapies.
spa_sauna_text: Finnish sauna, steam bath and relaxation room.
spa_relax_text: Quiet spaces designed for rest and recovery.
spa_private_text: Exclusive spa suites with whirlpool, sauna and privacy.
spa_cta_text: Enjoy wellness and relaxation at Hafendorf Rheinsberg
ip_meta_title: Indoor Playground | Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg
ip_meta_description: Indoor playground and family experiences at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg.
ip_hero_text: Fun, adventure and unforgettable family moments
ip_overview_text: At the Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg, families can enjoy a wide range of activities in a relaxed and safe environment. The resort is surrounded by nature and offers the perfect setting for children to play, explore and enjoy unforgettable experiences.
ip_boat_text: Discover the beautiful lake landscape by boat and enjoy a unique maritime experience with your family.
ip_cycling_text: Explore the Mecklenburg Lake District by bike and enjoy nature together on scenic routes.
ip_nature_text: Walk through forests, lakes and meadows and discover the natural beauty around Rheinsberg.
ip_family_text: Spend quality time together in a peaceful environment designed for relaxation and fun.
ip_cta_text: Experience relaxation, nature and unforgettable family moments at Lake Rheinsberg.
marina_meta_description: Discover the marina at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg with boat rentals and waterfront experiences.
marina_overview_text: Discover the heart of Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg: the marina on Lake Rheinsberg. Everything revolves around maritime flair and life on the water.
marina_card1_text: Beautiful marina surrounded by picturesque bridges and waterfront views.
marina_card2_text: Explore the lake landscape by renting a boat directly at the resort.
marina_card3_text: Guests can bring their own boats and use the marina docking service.
marina_card4_text: Enjoy relaxing days by the water with scenic lake views and activities.
marina_boating_text: Discover Lake Rheinsberg and surrounding waterways by boat.
marina_relax_text: Enjoy peaceful moments by the harbor with maritime atmosphere.
marina_cta_text: Enjoy unforgettable moments by the water at Hafendorf Rheinsberg
events_meta_title: Meetings & Events | Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg
events_meta_description: Host meetings, conferences and events at Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg.
events_hero_text: A unique venue for your event
events_overview_title: A Unique Venue for Your Event
events_overview_text1: The Sunday Resort Hafendorf Rheinsberg offers approximately 3,000 m² of multifunctional meeting space with 11 versatile event rooms.
events_overview_text2: Whether seminars, conferences or private celebrations – modern facilities and flexible layouts ensure the perfect setting for every event.
events_space1_text: Flexible meeting rooms equipped for seminars and conferences.
events_space2_text: Perfect venues for weddings, parties and special occasions.
events_space3_text: Spacious areas suitable for large-scale events and conferences.
events_amenity1_text: Fully equipped meeting rooms with modern technology.
events_amenity2_text: Guests can stay in comfortable rooms and suites.
events_amenity3_text: Customized catering from our restaurants and chefs.
events_amenity4_text: Relax after events in spa and wellness facilities.
events_cta_text: Our team will help you organize a successful event
